example_tasks: Run internet speed test on new router
Call ISP to upgrade bandwidth plan
Configure QoS settings for video conferencing
Troubleshoot slow wifi in the home office
Compare fiber internet providers in my area
Set up wired ethernet connection for gaming PC
Monitor network latency during peak hours
Optimize router placement for better signal
Download large dataset over high-speed connection
Test VPN connection speed and latency
Investigate bandwidth-hogging devices on local network
Upgrade home network switch to Gigabit
poor_matches: Backup local hard drive to external SSD
reasoning: The icon clearly combines a wifi signal with a speedometer needle, representing network speed, bandwidth, and internet performance. It is highly effective for tasks related to troubleshooting, testing, or upgrading internet connections.
